source_verdict: Source evidence supports golimumab, not adalimumab. GSE87473 is a mucosal biopsy SuperSeries with pediatric UC and adult UC/control subseries; publication evidence describes adult phase 3 and pediatric phase 1B golimumab trial-derived sources, but public records checked here did not expose a formal trial name such as PURSUIT.
overlap_risk: Low with ACT1/infliximab, UNIFI/ustekinumab, EUCALYPTUS/etrolizumab, and UNITI/ustekinumab rows; low-to-moderate conceptual overlap with PROgECT because both involve golimumab UC, but source records indicate distinct study structures.
